zh.Sneyd, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯尼德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Snede於1230年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，他的父親Richard de Alditheley43歲，母親Rosia de Praers of Snede40歲。他於1249年與Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1270年在他的家鄉享年40歲。

zh-hans.Sneyd, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯尼德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Snede于1230年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Richard de Alditheley43岁，母亲Rosia de Praers of Snede40岁。他于1249年与Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1270年在他的家乡享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Snede
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sneyd in Burslem, The Sneyd near Bloxwich (both Staffordshire), or Snead Farm and Snead Common in Rock (Worcestershire), all derived from Middle English snede ‘detached piece of land or woodland’ (Old English snǣd).

variants.name: Sneath
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and Rutland): habitational name from Snaith (Yorkshire), from Old Norse sneith ‘slice of land, piece of land cut off’. Compare Sneed .

variants.name: Snead
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Sneed  .

variants.name: Snee
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Sneed   with loss of the final consonant.
Irish (Mayo and Sligo): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sniadhaigh ‘descendant of Sniadhach’, a personal name apparently meaning ‘nitty’, from sneadh ‘nit’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Snede was born in 1230, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Alditheley, was 43 and his mother, Rosia de Praers of Snede, was 40. He married Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh in 1249, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1270, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Snede est né en 1230, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Alditheley, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Rosia de Praers of Snede, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh en 1249, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1270, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Snede 1230 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Alditheley 43 und seine Mutter Rosia de Praers of Snede 40. Er hat 1249 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1270 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Snede è nato il nel 1230 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Alditheley, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Rosia de Praers of Snede, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh nel 1249, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1270, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイア
ja.Sneyd, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスニード
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Snedeが1230年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard de Alditheleyは43歳，母Rosia de Praers of Snedeは40歳であった。1249年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでLady Joanna Stanley de Stonleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1270年に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Snede(이)가 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Alditheley(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Rosia de Praers of Snede(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1270년 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Sneyd, Staffordshire, England: Sneyd, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Snede nasceu em 1230, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Alditheley, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Rosia de Praers of Snede, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh em 1249, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1270, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Snede родился в 1230 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Alditheley было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Rosia de Praers of Snede, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh в 1249 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1270 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Snede nació en 1230, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Alditheley, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Rosia de Praers of Snede, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Lady Joanna Stanley de Stonleigh en 1249, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1270, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años.
